impact: This proves the daemon can distinguish an incomplete supersession record, which must keep checkbox-108 parked, from a complete evidence record, which may only recommend a task-board supersession and must not add crawler/domain artifacts.
summary: Add fixture-only checkbox-131 validation for checkbox-130 supersession decisions.
target_task: Task checkbox-131: Task checkbox-131: Add validation for the checkbox-130 supersession decision fixture proving missing evidence keeps checkbox-108 parked and complete evidence produces a task-board-only supersession recommendation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
